gpt-image-1.5.prompt: A 2x2 grid collage of lifestyle fashion photography featuring the same blonde woman across all four panels. She has long loose blonde hair with natural movement and a fit athletic build with a healthy glow. She wears a white athletic set consisting of a cropped white sports bra and white high-waisted shorts, paired with white sneakers and crew socks, a black shoulder bag, and minimal jewelry. The setting is an outdoor café walkway with a white modern building featuring a pergola overhead, lush green plants and vines, and stone tile flooring. She holds a green iced drink in a clear cup with straw throughout. The four panels show different poses: Panel 1 - standing casually, Panel 2 - leaning against a planter, Panel 3 - smiling while standing, Panel 4 - crouching with the drink. Natural daylight with soft shadows creates a bright airy healthy summer glow. Each frame has the subject centered with consistent framing. Same person with consistent features across all panels. No inconsistent faces. No indoor setting. Fresh healthy summer lifestyle aesthetic.
gpt-image-1.5.notes: Natural language paragraphs, explicit preservation constraints, no quality tags

seedream-4.5.prompt: 2x2 grid collage same blonde woman all four panels, fit athletic build long loose hair, white athletic set crop sports bra high-waisted shorts white sneakers black shoulder bag, outdoor café walkway white pergola lush green plants stone tiles, holding green iced drink clear cup, four poses standing casual leaning planter smiling crouching, natural daylight soft shadows healthy summer glow, lifestyle fashion photography clean aesthetic, not different faces across panels or inconsistent subject
seedream-4.5.notes: Coherent natural language, subject first, concise photography terms, inline style negation

flux-kontext-max.prompt: A 2x2 grid collage showing the same blonde woman in all four panels at an outdoor café. She has long loose blonde hair and a fit athletic build. She wears a white athletic set with cropped sports bra, high-waisted shorts, white sneakers, and black shoulder bag. The setting features a white modern building with pergola, lush green plants, and stone tile flooring. She holds a green iced drink throughout. Four poses: standing casually, leaning against planter, smiling while standing, crouching with drink. Natural daylight creates soft shadows and healthy summer glow. Consistent subject identity and styling across all panels.
flux-kontext-max.editing_prompt: Change the athletic set color from white to coral pink while keeping the same crop top and shorts style. Preserve the 2x2 grid layout, all four poses, the café setting, and ensure the same woman appears consistently across all panels.
flux-kontext-max.notes: Natural language with preservation clauses for editing mode, 512 token limit

playbook_principles_applied: 1_hierarchical_specificity: Detailed outfit breakdown, specific pose descriptions per panel, environment details
4_negative_hygiene: prevents inconsistent subject, different faces, wrong setting
5_spatial_consistency: clear 2x2 grid structure with pose variations
6_lighting_storytelling: 'natural daylight soft shadows' = fresh healthy summer mood
7_collage_structure: explicit grid layout with subject consistency requirement
